title: Manager Psychiatrie - Strategie / PEPP / Mergers (m/w/d)
required_skills: Several years of experience in hospital consulting and/or management with proven expertise in psychiatric and psychosomatic facilities
In-depth knowledge of regulatory, service-law and economic specificities of psychiatric care structures
Demonstrable track record in restructuring and change management projects in healthcare
Entrepreneurial mindset with strong implementation skills
Confident presence in sensitive organisational structures
Communication, networking, and business development (acquisition) skills
matched_skills: Cross-functional stakeholder management and C-level reporting — generic transferable skill
Project management and structured project execution — generic transferable skill
missing_skills: No hospital consulting or hospital management background
No PEPP-Systematik or healthcare reimbursement knowledge
No restructuring or change management in healthcare context
No M&A or due diligence experience
No networking in the German healthcare sector
core_responsibilities: Lead and direct complex strategy and transformation processes in healthcare organisations, especially psychiatric facilities
Develop innovative care models and outpatient structures; improve efficiency in psychiatric settings
Optimise processes under PEPP reimbursement system; restructure psychiatric and psychosomatic sites
Build, develop and lead interdisciplinary project teams with psychiatric expertise
Participate in M&A projects in healthcare; conduct commercial due diligence
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable — do not apply
The candidate has zero healthcare domain knowledge and zero consulting background in this specialised area
No CV emphasis can bridge the fundamental domain gap in psychiatric facility management and PEPP reimbursement expertise
summary: Poor match at 8.3%. This is a deeply specialised healthcare management consulting role requiring expertise in German psychiatric facility management, PEPP reimbursement systems, and hospital restructuring. The candidate's background in shipping, FinTech, and e-commerce offers no relevant domain experience. Not recommended for application.
